summary: The diff only modifies project_state.json (a metadata/tracking file), recording REQ-1 as a pending feature request. The actual backend/access-control.mo file was not modified in the diff, meaning the core requirement — replacing the contents of that file with the specified Motoko code — has not been implemented.

missing_requirements.requirement: Replace the contents of backend/access-control.mo with exactly the code provided by the user, including the owner-bypass logic in getUserRole, hasPermission, and isAdmin.
missing_requirements.reason: The diff shows only project_state.json was modified. The file backend/access-control.mo does not appear in the diff as added or modified, so the required code replacement was not performed.
